creator: Cy.Schubert@komquats.com
text:
In message <BLU0-SMTP202BF8E513F0A31ADCE3C7FA90E0@phx.gbl>, Chris Rees 
writes:
> Have you actually had a reply from portmgr about this though? Last time 
> I talked with them about this it was made pretty clear that rm is never 
> used in repocopies, and that I should just commit the new over the top 
> of the old, referencing the origin in the commit message...
> 
> If I manage to find the PR we were discussing I'll link.

I suppose that will be OK however the port's history will be split.

I'd be interested to look at that PR. No hurry though, I'm taking a week 
off to do some reno work around the house.

Thanks for looking for the PR.


-- 
Cheers,
